function.message: I could not complete the oldest inbox request because the workspace does not expose a supported workflow for forwarding a document through the Work Review Calendar channel.
function.rulebook_notes: I followed the required bootstrap, read the inbox-processing workflow, used the canonical entity file for Nina's contact info, and checked the channel docs before deciding whether the request was supported.
function.outcome_justification: 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asks to forward 30_knowledge/capture/integration-agents-need-guardrails.md using the existing Work Review Calendar channel. 60_outbox/channels/work_calendar.md defines that channel as kind `calendar` with address `calendar://miles-work`. 99_system/workflows/sending-email.md only specifies how to prepare outbound email records under 60_outbox/outbox/ and does not provide any workflow for forwarding content through a calendar channel. Because the sandbox offers no visible calendar-send workflow or tool, the requested action is unsupported from the available evidence.
